checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #259 authorized bounded v2 operation-list and report-schema hardening, additive tests, docs/context updates, a normal non-force v2 push, CI evidence, and v1 evidence files. The final report records those outcomes.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The v2 repo has operation-report-hardening contract and scope files, validator support for array shape, non-blank string entries, optional forbidden_operations validation, duplicate operation rejection, cross-list conflict rejection, successful validation of prior scopes, additive T16-T24 tests, pushed commit 17519712a6ed3d6841cc63ed351bb945e7c2915f, local tests passing, and CI passing.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The work stayed inside declared v1 evidence files and declared v2 implementation/docs/test/context files. It did not access secrets, install dependencies, deploy, change production, billing, auth, authorization, database, external AI providers, hosted runtime, MCP mutation, repository visibility, CI workflow security, force push, or branch deletion.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No secrets, credentials, keys, production settings, auth, billing, database, deployment, or destructive infrastructure were touched. The only remote mutation was the authorized normal non-force push to v2 origin/master after local tests passed.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All v1 evidence files are declared in the issue #259 scope manifest. The v2 changed files match the external paths declared in the execution contract and the v2 operation-report-hardening scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: SpecBridge v2 local tests passed with 156 passed and 0 failed. v2 git diff --check and touched-file ASCII/no-BOM scan passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions run 28144078342 for v2 workflow CI completed successfully on 17519712a6ed3d6841cc63ed351bb945e7c2915f. The v1 evidence branch has not been opened as a PR, so v1 merge CI is not collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the initial Claude invocation failure, the second Claude partial implementation, Codex repair/completion, successful local tests, successful push, successful CI, the v1 merge gate, and residual risks.

findings.evidence: The v1 evidence branch has not been opened as a PR and therefore has no GitHub CI or review gate for merge into main.
findings.recommendation: Open a v1 PR for the evidence branch and merge only after required gates pass and operator merge authority is explicit.

findings.evidence: The v2 validator now validates operation-list consistency but does not execute or sandbox operations.
findings.recommendation: Implement runtime operation enforcement under a future dedicated contract if v2 grows beyond static validation.

unresolved_risks: V1 evidence is not merged into main.
specbridge-v2 master is not branch-protected due GitHub plan/private visibility limitation.
Runtime enforcement of operation permissions remains future scope.
